_metadata.description: Chart of Accounts categories for HDFC business statement classification.
_metadata.note: Add or rename categories here. The CoAMapper loads this file at runtime — no code changes needed.

categories.name: Payroll
categories.description: Salary credits, payroll payments, advance salary transfers to employees

categories.name: ATM Withdrawal
categories.description: Cash withdrawn from ATMs via ATW, NWD, or EAW transactions

categories.name: Fuel & Auto
categories.description: Petrol, diesel, CNG purchases, automobile parts, vehicle servicing (HP, HPCL, fuel centres, automobile shops)

categories.name: Healthcare & Medical
categories.description: Medical supplies, pharmacy, healthcare product purchases (UKAR HEALTHCARE, medical stores)

categories.name: Utilities & Telecom
categories.description: Mobile recharge, broadband, electricity, gas, water bills (Airtel, PhonePe bill payments, Jio, BSNL)

categories.name: Software & IT
categories.description: SaaS subscriptions, app purchases, digital services, cloud payments

categories.name: Bank Charges & Fees
categories.description: ATM usage fees, non-home branch charges, service charges, GST on banking fees

categories.name: Credit Card Repayment
categories.description: Autopay or manual payments towards credit card dues (CC AUTOPAY, AUTOPAY SI-TAD, AUTOPAY SI-MAD)

categories.name: Fund Transfer
categories.description: Internal transfers between own accounts, FUND TRF DM transactions

categories.name: UPI & Digital Payment
categories.description: Generic UPI transfers, PhonePe, Google Pay, Paytm payments where merchant is unknown

categories.name: E-Commerce & Retail
categories.description: Online shopping — Amazon, Flipkart, Meesho, and other retail purchases

categories.name: Travel & Transport
categories.description: IRCTC train tickets, cab bookings, travel agent payments, Paytm travel

categories.name: Cash Deposit
categories.description: Cash deposited into the account (CD transactions)

categories.name: Interest & Dividends
categories.description: Bank interest credited, dividend income, investment returns

categories.name: Loan & EMI
categories.description: EMI payments, loan repayments, credit line settlements

categories.name: IMPS Transfer
categories.description: IMPS person-to-person or business transfers where payee name is visible

categories.name: Uncategorized
categories.description: Transactions that do not clearly fit any other category
